name: Orbs Network
description: Decentralized Layer-3 blockchain for advanced on-chain trading. Provides AI agent skills for gasless swap orders.

skills.name: Advanced Swap Orders
skills.description: Gasless limit, stop-loss, take-profit, and TWAP orders across EVM chains. Non-custodial, oracle-protected execution using immutable, audited contracts. Supports any AI coding agent like Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf.
